payload.label: side table
payload.long_description: Small dark-brown wooden side table with a turned leg and rounded tabletop visible in the crop; top holds stacked books and a draped cloth, base shows scuffs and wear; object is partially edge-cropped and occluded by items, and appears close to the camera (estimated ~0.8 m away).
